vocab.meaning: yêu cầu về mặt hậu cần
vocab.example: The logistical requirements of a mountain trek are far more complex than those of a weekend city break.

vocab.meaning: những món đồ thiết yếu không thể thiếu
vocab.example: While I pack light, certain items like a portable power bank and a universal adapter remain indispensable staples in my bag.
If I'm traveling for business, I try to streamline my luggage to avoid the hassle of checked bags at the airport.

vocab.meaning: trang phục phù hợp với khí hậu
vocab.example: Transitioning from a tropical zone to a temperate one necessitates a complete shift in climate-appropriate attire.
Photography expeditions require highly specialized equipment that I wouldn't dream of carrying on a casual beach holiday.
For short domestic trips, I usually just bring an all-purpose kit that covers all my basic hygiene and tech needs.

vocab.meaning: hành lý cồng kềnh, gây trở ngại
vocab.example: I’ve learned the hard way that carrying cumbersome baggage can really dampen the joy of exploring a new city on foot.

vocab.meaning: đồ dùng thông thường theo thói quen
vocab.example: Depending on the destination's safety profile, my customary gear might include a hidden money belt for extra security.

vocab.meaning: những đồ dùng dư thừa, không cần thiết
vocab.example: I strictly audit my suitcase before leaving to strip away any redundant items that just add unnecessary weight.
When space is at a premium, I rely on multifunctional accessories like a sarong that can double as a towel or a blanket.
